24 people own a car.

(a) 
t Ranjit asks each of these 24 people the colour of their car.

The bar chart shows some of these results.

(i)  Complete the bar chart by drawing the bar for the colour red.

 Write down the mode.

 How many more people have a green car than have a blue car?

t The table shows the size, in litres, of each of the 24 car engines.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
Engine size (litres) & 0.8 & 1.2 & 1.5 & 1.8 & 2.4 \\
\hline
Frequency & 7 & 4 & 5 & 6 & 2 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
Calculate the mean.

t Ranjit also asks each of the 24 people what type of car they have.

The pie chart shows some of these results.

(i)  Work out the number of hybrid cars.

 The rest of the cars are either petrol or diesel.

There are 8 petrol cars.

Complete the pie chart to show this information.

Calculate the mean. t Ranjit also asks each of the 24 people what type of car they have. The pie chart shows some of these results. (i) Work out the number of hybrid cars. The rest of the cars are either petrol or diesel. There are 8 petrol cars. Complete the pie chart to show this information.

tex:
Mr and Mrs Perez and their 3 children go on holiday to Tokyo.

(a) 
t The holiday costs \$3800 for an adult and \$2400 for a child.

8\% tax is then added to the cost of the holiday.

Find the total cost of the holiday, including tax, for the Perez family.

t The plane takes 11 hours 40 minutes to fly from Los Angeles to Tokyo.

The plane leaves on Wednesday at 10\,35 local time.

The local time in Tokyo is 17 hours ahead of the local time in Los Angeles.

(i)  Find the day and local time in Tokyo when the plane arrives.

{---} \quad Time ][]

 The distance the plane flies is 8820\,km.

Calculate the average speed of the plane.

t The diagram shows a conversion graph between dollars and Japanese yen.

A watch costs \$100.

Find the cost of this watch in yen.

t The family go to a restaurant.

The total cost of the food and drinks is \$154.

The ratio cost of food : cost of drinks $= 21 : 4$.

Work out the cost of drinks.

(a) 
t Apples cost $\$a$ per kilogram and bananas cost $\$b$ per kilogram.

Lee buys 6\,kg of apples and 8\,kg of bananas.

Write down an expression, in terms of $a$ and $b$, for the total cost, in dollars, of the apples and the bananas.

t Cara is one year older than twice Asher's age.

Brice is 22 years older than Asher.

The total of their three ages is 167.

Find the age of each person.

t Solve the simultaneous equations.

You must show all your working.
\begin{align*}
3x + 2y &= 21 \\
2x - 5y &= 33
\end{align*}

The diagram shows four flags, $F$, $A$, $B$ and $C$, on a grid.

(a) 
t Describe fully the **single** transformation that maps

(i)  flag $F$ onto flag $A$,

 flag $F$ onto flag $B$,

 flag $F$ onto flag $C$.

t On the grid, draw the image of flag $F$ after a translation by the vector $\displaystyle\binom{3}{-4}$.

(a) 
t

The area of rectangle $A$ is equal to the area of rectangle $B$.

Work out which rectangle has the greater perimeter and by how much.

Calculate the radius of this circle.

t

Find the area of this triangle.

 On the grid, draw the graph of $y = x^2 + 2x - 4$ for $-5 \leqslant x \leqslant 3$.

 Use your graph to solve the equation $x^2 + 2x - 4 = 0$.

Write down the equation of the line parallel to $L$ that passes through $(0, -2)$.
